description: OutCallerAI is a voice AI platform for automating inbound and outbound business calling workflows. It lets organizations create AI agents, manage campaigns and leads, and handle customer conversations across phone and related integrations.
summary: OutCallerAI exposes one documented authenticated REST API at `https://outcallerai.com/api/v1/public`, secured with a Bearer API key generated in the dashboard; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.
